children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitIfIndex
children.description:
Indicates an interface enabled with ARP-MISS 
                            or an interface receiving the ARP packets.

children.name: hwEthARPLimitTable
children.description: Configure the ARP limit based on interfaces or VLANs.

children.name: hwEthernetARPAntiGateWayConflict
children.description: This object indicates the status of the ARP anti-gateway-conflict.

children.name: hwEthernetARPHostInfoTable
children.description:
The table contains the information of local host and remote host. 
                         The information includes host IP, host MAC, gateway VtepIP, gateway VNIID.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitConfigured
children.description: The Configured Speed Limit Value of ARP Speed Limit.

children.name: hwArpDynTable
children.description:
The value of the object identifies the items of ARP table, 
                such as IP address of ARP items, VPN instance name of ARP items, 
                MAC address of ARP items, VLAN information of ARP items, expire time of ARP items. 
                hwArpDynEntryIfIndex: indicates the interface index.
                hwArpDynEntryIpAdd: indicates the IP address.
                hwArpDynEntryVrf: indicates the VPN instance name.
                hwArpDynEntryMacAdd: indicates the MAC address.
                hwArpDynEntryVlanId: indicates the VLAN of ARP item.
                hwArpDynEntryCeVlanId: indicates the CE VLAN of ARP item.
                hwArpDynEntryOutIfIndex: indicates the forwarding interface.
                hwArpDynEntryExpireTime: indicates the expire time of ARP item.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitTable
children.description:
The table contains the configuration information of Ethernet ARP Speed limit slot. 
                The information includes type, speedvalue, sourceip and destip.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitType
children.description: The Type of ARP Speed Limit.

children.name: hwArpSecValidateTable
children.description: The table contains the arp validation information on the interface.

children.name: hwEthernetARPReceiveDstIPAddr
children.description: This object indicates the destination IP address of the received packet.

children.name: hwEthernetARPIPConflictType
children.description: This object indicates the conflict type.

children.name: hwEthernetARPReceiveDstMAC
children.description: This object indicates the destination MAC of the received packet.

children.name: hwARPRemoteInterface
children.description: This object indicates the remote interface.

children.name: hwEthernetARPLimitExceedInfoTable
children.description:
The table contains the information of learnt ARP packet. 
                         The information includes interface of arp packet, the learnt number of arp packet, the limit number of arp packet, the recover reason of arp limit.

children.name: hwEthernetARPConflictDetect
children.description: Indicates the ARP conflict detect. In this way, router can detect ARP entries conflict.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitVPNinstance
children.description: The VPN-instance name of ARP Speed Limit.

children.name: hwEthernetARPStaticsTable
children.description:
A table contains the statistics about Ethernet ARP. 
                The statistics include number of received ARP packets, 
                number of received ARP-MISS packets, number of learned ARP packets, 
                number of discarded ARP packets caused by the ARP limit, 
                the number of discarded ARP-MISS packets caused by the limit 
                and the number of discarded ARP and ARP-MISS packets caused by other reasons.

children.name: hwEthernetARPStaticsEntry
children.description:
A table contains the statistics about Ethernet ARP. 
                The statistics include number of received ARP packets, 
                number of received ARP-MISS packets, number of learned ARP packets, 
                number of discarded ARP packets caused by the ARP limit, 
                the number of discarded ARP-MISS packets caused by the limit 
                and the number of discarded ARP and ARP-MISS packets caused by other reasons.

children.name: hwEthernetARPAntiAttackStatus
children.description: This object indicates the status of the ARP anti-attack.

children.name: hwEthernetARPReceiveCEVLAN
children.description: This object indicates the CE VLAN of the received packet.

children.name: hwEthernetARPEntrySpecDynamicNumber
children.description: This object indicates the number of dynamic ARP entries.

children.name: hwEthernetARPReplaceRateThresholdValue
children.description: This object indicates replace rate threshold value.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitSupType
children.description: This object indicates ARP speed limit suptype.

children.name: hwEthernetARPReceiveInterfaceName
children.description: This object indicates the inbound interface name of the received packet.

children.name: hwEthernetARPEntrySpecValue
children.description: This object indicates the spec of the alarm generated.

children.name: hwEthernetARPIPAddress
children.description: This object indicates the IP address.

children.name: hwEthernetARPSpeedLimitCurrent
children.description: The Current Speed Limit Value of ARP Speed Limit.

children.name: hwArpEntryGatewayConflictTable
children.description:
The value of the object identifies the information about the source of the attack. 
                It contains IP address, MAC, VLAN ID and interface.

children.name: hwEthARPShowWithInterAndVidTable
children.description: Display the ARP table based on interface number or interface number and VLAN ID.

children.name: hwArpEntryExpireControlTable
children.description:
The value of the object identifies the parameters of ARP aging detection, 
                such as ARP detection mode, start time, detection times. At present, 
                only the ARP detection mode and ARP fake-entry expire time can be configured.
                hwArpEntryExpireIfIndex: indicates the interface index.
                hwArpEntryExpireDetectMode: indicates the unicast or broadcast ARP aging detection mode.
                hwArpEntryExpireFakeTime: indicates the expire time of ARP fake entry.

children.name: hwArpEntryExpireControlEntry
children.description:
The value of the object identifies the parameters of ARP aging detection, 
                such as ARP detection mode, start time, detection times. At present, 
                only the ARP detection mode and ARP fake-entry expire time can be configured.
                hwArpEntryExpireIfIndex: indicates the interface index.
                hwArpEntryExpireDetectMode: indicates the unicast or broadcast ARP aging detection mode.
                hwArpEntryExpireFakeTime: indicates the expire time of ARP fake entry.

children.name: hwArpLinkInterfaceTable
children.description:
Config ARP link interface:
                hwArpLinkIfIndex: interface index
                hwArpLinkPeerIp: peer ip
                hwArpLinkDetectTime: detection time between two ARP packects
                hwArpLinkDetectTimes: detection times of ARP packects
                hwArpLinkDetectMode: detection mode
                hwArpLinkStatus: interface status
                hwArpLinkRowStatus: the row status of this row.
